name: Codenames: Pictures
description: Codenames: Pictures is Vlaada Chvátil's image-based take on the Codenames family — instead of words, the 5x4 grid is filled with surreal illustrated cards (a steam-train through a piano, a clock with bird-wings, a fish wearing a top hat). Two team spymasters give one-word clues that connect multiple of their team's pictures, while avoiding the opposing team's, the bystanders, and the dreaded assassin. Same elegant deduction skeleton as the original, with the abstract images often producing wilder clue-leaps.
